markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Streamline admin tasks and review client-specific blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Monday Update Process:** Team members will now draft client updates in Notion on Fridays, freeing Katya for strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Automation Initiative:** The team will brainstorm automation ideas next week to reduce admin overhead, starting with a review of Carrie's workshop recording.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [**Simran's Pipeline Ownership:** Simran will take ownership of the Understory/Udemy pipelines, moving post-processing from Claude to Atlas to improve quality and efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Client Blockers:** Biologica content delivery is paused pending an invoice, and Simran needs access to the Understory external channel.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

## Topics

### Streamlining Admin & Automations

  - [**Problem:** Manual admin tasks (e.g., Monday client updates) consume time needed for strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**Solution 1: New Monday Update Process**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [**Why:** To free up Katya's time for strategic work (e.g., keyword research, surge pieces).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [**How:** A Notion template will be created on Fridays for team members to draft updates (last week's articles, this week's plan).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Solution 2: Automation Initiative**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reduce admin overhead across the team.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**Resources:**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
          - [Carrie's automation workshop recording (Katya to share).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
          - [Jessalynn's existing automations (weekly publishing, status changes in Airtable).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
          - [Looker Dashboard automation script (Jessalynn to follow up with Suleman on its status).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Next Week:** The team will brainstorm automation ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Client-Specific Blockers

  - [**Biologica (Felix)**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Content delivery is paused pending an invoice payment.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Action:** Hold all content (revisions, publication tickets). Focus on Metronome today, then revise Biologica content later this week.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Understory (Simran)**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [**Blocker 1:** Missing podcast article transcripts and images → articles are shelved.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [**Blocker 2:** Simran needs access to the external channel for updates.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya to add Simran to the channel by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Udemy (Simran)**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [**Request:** Build a content calendar like Understory's to enable proactive publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya to build the calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Anythink (Jessalynn)**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Cannot automate publishing due to the Sanity CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Action:** Jessalynn to confirm with the Edge team if Sanity automation is now possible.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [**WebStacks (Jessalynn)**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Publishing automations are broken due to a client process change.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [**Action:** Jessalynn to fix the relevant Linear ticket (Katya to tag her).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Simran's Pipeline Ownership & Development

  - [**Goal:** Simran will take ownership of the Understory/Udemy pipelines to improve efficiency and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Why:** To reduce post-processing time (currently 30–40 min/article) and enable a future shift to strategic work (e.g., keyword research).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Key Actions:**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Move from Claude to Atlas:** Replicate the post-processing checklist in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
          - [**Why:** To improve content quality directly in the pipeline and align with the company-wide initiative to move away from Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Increase Pipeline Ownership:**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
          - [File ENG tickets for complex updates (e.g., tables, linking).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
          - [Use internal channels to ask questions and unblock progress.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
          - [Ensure all Understory articles have complete SEO metadata to maintain blog page integrity and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**Resources for Pipeline Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [Fathom recordings of Production Team meetings (since Nov 2025).](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [Panzer's workshops on conflict analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [Documentation from the training articles team.](https://fathom.video/share/XzkHQEkfosWnmsJVk7yNsvQJ3HjkAgjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
